description: Core trigger and routing evals for the Contextro MCP skill. Aligned to Anthropic skill guidance: concise frontmatter, correct triggering, problem-first routing, and avoidance of token-heavy anti-patterns.

source_docs: Anthropic effective harnesses for long-running agents

categories.triggering: Skill loads on obvious and paraphrased Contextro requests
categories.routing: Correct Contextro tool chosen for the user task
categories.anti_pattern: Agent avoids wasteful or unsafe alternatives when Contextro fits
categories.response_format: Agent correctly interprets current response payloads and wrappers

evals.name: trigger-index-project
evals.prompt: Index this project at /Users/alice/platform so I can search it.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent calls index with the path and treats `status: "done"` as sufficient readiness for normal follow-up search-oriented tools.

assertions.text: index is called with the requested path

evals.name: trigger-search-concept
evals.prompt: Search the codebase for how rate limiting is implemented.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill loads. Agent uses search for conceptual discovery.

assertions.text: search is used for concept search
assertions.passing_condition: search called with a rate-limiting-related query

evals.name: response-format-columnar-file-symbols
evals.prompt: Use get_document_symbols on a file and tell me the first symbol name and line. The tool returns {"file":"src/cache.rs","columns":["name","type","line","end_line"],"symbols":[["QueryCache","class",14,20],["get","method",34,46]],"total":2}.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent reads the columnar payload via the columns array and reports QueryCache at line 14 without assuming symbols[0].name exists.

assertions.text: columnar symbol rows are interpreted correctly
assertions.passing_condition: agent identifies the first symbol as QueryCache on line 14 using columns-aware interpretation

evals.name: response-format-list-symbols-file-vs-directory
evals.prompt: A file-path list_symbols call returned {"file":"src/cache.rs","columns":["name","type","line"],"symbols":[["QueryCache","class",14]],"total":1}, while a directory-path list_symbols call returned {"path":"src","symbols":[{"name":"QueryCache","type":"class","file":"src/cache.rs","line":14,"callers":2,"callees":4}],"total":1}. Explain the difference.
evals.expected_behavior: Agent explains that file-path list_symbols aliases get_document_symbols and is columnar, while directory-path list_symbols returns object rows with callers/callees.

assertions.text: file and directory list_symbols contracts are distinguished
assertions.passing_condition: agent states that file-path list_symbols is columnar and directory-path list_symbols returns object rows with callers/callees
